title: Blue eyes dragon [cobblemon]
description: adds blue eyes white dragon and ultimate to cobblemon
body:
Blue-Eyes White Dragon Datapack Unleash the legendary might of Blue-Eyes White Dragon in your Cobblemon world! This datapack introduces a powerful Dragon/Steel-type Pokémon inspired by the iconic dueling monster from the Yu-Gi-Oh! universe. ⚠️ IMPORTANT: - Requires Mega Showdown to function properly. - Must be installed in both the datapack and resourcepack folders. - **CHECK GALLERY FOR POLYMERIZATION RECIPE REQUIRED TO MEGA EVOLVE IT DOESNT EXIST IN JEI ETC**
📥 Installation Instructions **Singleplayer:** - Put the `.zip` in `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks` - Put the `.zip` in `/resourcepacks` - Enable in game via `ESC` → `Options` → `Resource Packs` **Servers:** - Put the `.zip` in `/world/datapacks` - (Sometimes it's called `myworld`, or something similar — it may also have a custom name) - If you're in doubt about the correct folder, consult your server provider's guide on how to add datapacks **Every Player** has to have the `.zip` installed as a **Resource Pack** - Best option is for them to have it installed and enabled in their client - It's possible to add it to **server resources**, but note there have been issues with this for some Cobblemon addons — so try whatever method suits you best
📦 Different Versions *READ* There are **4 new files**: - 2 for **Physical-focused Blue-Eyes / Ultimate Blue-Eyes** - 2 for **Special Attack-focused Blue-Eyes / Ultimate Blue-Eyes** - **R3** = Physical Blue-Eyes with **ride-on compatibility** *(kinda janky)* and **no custom moves** - **R4** = Physical Blue-Eyes with **ride-on compatibility** *(kinda janky)* and **custom moves/abilities** - **R5** = Special Attack-focused Blue-Eyes with **ride-on compatibility** *(kinda janky)* and **no custom moves** - **blueeyesultimate** = The **ultimate OP special-attack-focused** version with **ride-on compatibility** *(kinda janky)* and **custom moves/abilities**
✨ Custom Abilities - **Divine Dragon’s Aura** Upon entering battle, harsh divine pressure lowers all enemy stats by 1 stage (including accuracy and evasion), and traps them from switching out. - Negates Ground-type immunities. - Prevents switching/escaping. - Enemy loses 1 extra PP per move use against the user. - User is always treated as airborne (ignores terrain effects like Spikes). - **Divine Scales** On switch-in, boosts user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage each. - Heals 1/16 of max HP at the end of every turn.
🔥 Custom Moves - **Burst Stream of Destruction** 140 BP Steel-type blast. User must recharge on the next turn. - **Chaos MAX Cannon** 180 BP Dragon-type pulse. Ignores Protect, screens, and abilities. Always hits unless accuracy/evasion affects it. - **Divine Dragon Light** Status move that confuses the target and causes its next move to fail. - **Draconic Annihilation** 130 BP Steel-type physical move. Power is boosted 1.5× if no terrain is active. Clears terrain after use. - **Draconic Velocity** 70 BP Dragon-type priority move (+1). If it knocks out the target, boosts the user’s Speed by 1. - **White Lightning** A blazing bolt of Dragon-type energy. 120 BP, 10% chance to paralyze. - **White Nova Storm** Unleashes a 95 BP Dragon-type blast. 30% chance to burn, 20% chance to flinch. - **Dragon Mirror** Protects the user for the turn and raises its Special Attack. - **Dragon Roar** Forces the target to switch out and lowers its Attack. - **Neo Destruction Pulse** A 100 BP Steel-type pulse that hits all adjacent foes. 20% chance to lower Special Defense. - **Neutron Blast** Dragon-type special attack that hits 3 times. Raises user's Speed by 1 and lowers Defense by 1. - **Shatter Fang** An 85 BP Steel-type bite. 20% chance to lower the target's Defense. - **Steelburst Crash** 100 BP Steel-type that hits through Protect and Reflect. User takes 25% recoil. - **Tri-Head Destruction** Steel-type multi-hit move (1–3 times). If all 3 hits land, the target is instantly KO’d. - **Trinity Obliteration** Dragon-type move with 50% accuracy. If it hits, all opponents faint. If it misses, the user faints.
🌍 Spawn Details - Biome: Desert Pyramids - Time: Day - Rarity: Ultra Rare - Level: 70
⚔️ Blue-Eyes Physical Base Stats **Typing:** Dragon / Steel **Abilities:** - levitate - Dragons Maw - H:Moxie (no custom abilities) / divinescales (custom) **Base Stats (BST: 680):** - HP: 110 - Attack: 160 - Defense: 110 - Special Attack: 120 - Special Defense: 90 - Speed: 90 **Mega Evolution:** - Name: Ultimate Blue-Eyes - Method: Mega Evolves using Polymerization - Ability: Moxie (no custom abilities)/ divine dragons aura (custom) - Base Stats (BST: 780): - HP: 110 - Attack: 200 - Defense: 130 - Special Attack: 130 - Special Defense: 90 - Speed: 120
🔮 Blue-Eyes Special Attack Base Stats **Typing:** Dragon / Steel **Abilities:** - levitate - Dragons Maw - H:soul-heart(no custom ability) / divinescales (custom) **Base Stats (BST: 680):** - HP: 115 - Attack: 100 - Defense: 115 - Special Attack: 170 - Special Defense: 90 - Speed: 100 **Mega Evolution (BST: 720):** - Name: Ultimate Blue-Eyes - Method: Mega Evolves using Polymerization - Ability: soul-heart (no custom abilities)/ divine dragons aura (custom) - HP: 110 - Attack: 110 - Defense: 90 - Special Attack: 200 - Special Defense: 90 - Speed: 120
Permissions & Thanks - Special thanks to @tontra_ (https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-pokemans) for giving permission and providing the original Rayquaza model work. - Huge shoutout to @jokerloom (https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1282602852962795530) for creating this commission of Blue-Eyes Rayquaza and Blue-Eyes Mega Rayquaza for me. - And a massive thank you to @_lvnatic (https://modrinth.com/user/Lvnatic) — without his help setting up this datapack, it wouldn’t even exist. Please check out his work and support his page! - Link to discord channel for my addons (just this one atm) https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1396757614993477653 --- **This Addon is licensed under CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0, meaning you are allowed to use it on public servers/modpacks, if you provide sufficient credit and don't put anything from this addon behind a paywall! Sharing remixes is allowed as long as the original License is applied to it.**
